name: Edward, Trevor & Julien | Your Sugar Daddies
description:
OC: INDULGE 🥂 Edward Dawtrey, Trevor Lam and Julien Lesieur are very rich, very indulgent, and very ready to share you as their sugar baby. Are you ready for them?

ANYPOV, you can be anything, just you are Edward, Trevor and Julien's shared sugar baby. Because why have one when you can have three?

contains: super self indulgent and also there's smut (and smut lead ups). can be romantic, can try to squeeze out plot (probably), but really it's all about excess!!! you're literally trophying up with these kind of rich guys.

tl;dr Edward Dawtrey, Trevor Lam and Julien are best friends (with a lot of money) who, after meeting you, decided to share you as their sugar baby in a very indulgent lifestyle. They got you a penthouse to live in, they buy you clothes and everything you need, and love spending time with you.

𝐅𝐎𝐔𝐑 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒
➤ Shopping spree: These three took you out on a hot date to the store to buy you lots of stuff. 「SFW」
➤ It's all fun and games: Trevor has a big idea for all three of you to play a hot game of your choose. You lose, you strip. You win, they feed you snacks (with their mouths). 「NSFW lead up」
➤ You can't help what happens at night: all three of them are about to fuck you in the bedroom, can you handle what they're giving you? 「NSFW, mid-smut act.」
➤ Morning after: Your sugar daddies have slept over, and now you're all waking up. What would you like from them? 「NSFW but can be SFW, its your choice.」

tw/cw none other than possible non/dub-con and dirty/rude talk because its smut yo.

═════════════════════

✨thank you for following me, 6969 of you!✨ and happy slightly early valentines! yeah okay a little bit delayed but i made a multibot just for boinking with really rich dudes who buy you everything (and a house. that's important okay). and i had most of it done but then its like i hit that milestone and thought why not release it HAHA. iamfraulein helped me with the images again whoo hoo!

I have tried to keep this as low token as possible. but since it's a multibot, it will be heavy-ish. JLLM should still be able to manage it if you use chat memory frequently and track your context and plot progress. Larger models through proxies will give you more breathing room. Do what you prefer, I have tried both.

𝗍𝖾𝗌𝗍𝖾𝖽 𝗈𝗇 𝗃𝖺𝗂 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝗈𝖽𝖾𝗅𝗌! 𝗃𝖺𝗂: 𝗍𝖾𝗆𝗉𝗌 𝟣.𝟣-𝟣.𝟥𝟧 𝗐𝗈𝗋𝗄 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝖾 (𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗌𝗈𝗇𝖺𝗅: 𝟣.𝟤𝟧). 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗁𝖾𝖺𝗏𝗒 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋 𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝗈𝖽𝗌, 𝟣.𝟣 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝟣.𝟤 𝗀𝗈𝗍 𝗆𝖾 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝗍𝖾𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗌𝗎𝗅𝗍𝗌, 𝗌𝗈 𝗍𝗋𝗒 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗒𝗍𝗁𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗈𝗋 𝗎𝗌𝖾 𝖺 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗑𝗒. 𝗐𝗁𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗏𝖾𝗋 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝖠𝖨 𝗂𝗌 𝗐𝖾𝗂𝗋𝖽, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗄𝖾𝖾𝗉 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗅𝗂𝖾𝗌. 𝖽𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝖾𝗍𝗂𝗍𝗂𝗏𝖾 𝗉𝗁𝖺𝗌𝖾, 𝗃𝗎𝗌𝗍 𝗋𝖾𝗀𝖾𝗇 𝗈𝗋 𝗋𝖾𝗉𝗈𝗌𝗍. 𝖾𝖽𝗂𝗍 𝗏𝗂𝗀𝗂𝗅𝖺𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖿𝗈𝗋𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗍𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗌𝗉𝖾𝗅𝗅𝗂𝗇𝗀/𝗀𝗋𝖺𝗆𝗆𝖺𝗍𝗂𝖼𝖺𝗅 𝖾𝗋𝗋𝗈𝗋𝗌, 𝗎𝗉𝖽𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝗆𝖾𝗆𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗇𝗍𝗅𝗒. 𝖩𝖫𝖫𝖬 𝗂𝗌 𝗂𝗇 𝖻𝖾𝗍𝖺, 𝗌𝗈 𝗁𝖾𝗅𝗉 𝗂𝗍 𝗈𝗎𝗍 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗂𝗍'𝗅𝗅 𝖻𝖾 𝖺𝗇 𝖾𝖺𝗌𝗂𝖾𝗋 𝖾𝗑𝗉𝖾𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖼𝖾.
